arts.ttl: Every word Unai Emery said about injuries, managing emotions, Asensio's importance and Club Brugge
arts.sum: I know how competitive they are and how they are doing in the Champions League and when we analyse them we see them playing with confidence and playing strong and it’s a really good challenge to play against a team with experience in Europe and experienced players as well. "We are always trying to analyse and get information about each match we are playing with the players about the difficulties we’re facing.

arts.ttl: Club Brugge vs Aston Villa: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Aston Villa travel to Club Brugge in the Champions League on Tuesday. Preview includes team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery makes feelings clear to Aston Villa team with Champions League demand
arts.sum: Aston Villa will meet Club Brugge once more in the Champions League - having already lost to the Belgian side in the group stage - as they enter the last 16 stage of Europe's premier club competition

arts.ttl: Aston Villa captain John McGinn's telling admission over Unai Emery's public comments
arts.sum: Aston Villa facing Club Brugge in the last 16 of the Champions League with Unai Emery maintaining Villa are contenders in Europe's premier club competition - but his skipper has clear feelings on his public comments

arts.ttl: Champions League: Aston Villa hopes of Club Brugge revenge boosted as triple return confirmed
arts.sum: Villa welcome back a host of senior players for the crucial Champions League tie

arts.ttl: McGinn keen for Villa’s ‘revenge’ upon return to Brugge in Champions League
arts.sum: Unai Emery says tie comes at ‘key moment’ in the season Pau Torres and Boubacar Kamara may feature in Belgium John McGinn has said Aston Villa are eyeing “sporting revenge” against Club Brugge in their Champions League last-16 first leg and believes Villa can achieve “something special” if they solve their inconsistencies. Unai Emery conceded things are delicately balanced with this a significant moment in Villa’s season. Villa slipped to a shock defeat at the Belgian champions in November, their first on their return to Europe’s premier club competition. Brugge scored the only goal from the spot after Tyrone Mings was penalised for bizarrely picking the ball up inside the box. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: John McGinn reveals why Aston Villa are ready to ‘make some history’ in Champions League
arts.sum: Villa are in the last 16 of the Champions League and face Club Brugge away from home on Tuesday

arts.ttl: John McGinn gives his verdict on Marcus Rashford's start to life at Aston Villa and makes a prediction about the on-loan Man United star
arts.sum: John McGinn has hailed the impact of Aston Villa's loan stars and backed Marcus Rashford to score his first goal for the club when the Champions League resumes on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: John McGinn reveals Marcus Rashford wish as 'big egos' fear rejected
arts.sum: John McGinn has praised Marcus Rashford and Marco Asensio’s work ethic since joining Aston Villa last month. John McGinn reveals Marcus Rashford wish as 'big egos' fear rejected
